ticker: Sunday Victory Service - live now at the Main Auditorium
Main Camp Road closed 10AM-2PM - use Alternative Route 2
Lost & Found: black wallet recovered at Gate B - contact security

quotes.text: Thanksgiving is the glue that helps to firmly attach your blessings to you.
The first and biggest victory of all is victory over your own self.
Brethren, this is the time anybody will need grace more than ever before.
If you have been struggling with a problem, try praise.
When in trouble, praise and thank God.

fact.text: Redemption City was officially commissioned in 1999 and now hosts over 1 million visitors annually during major conventions.

devotional.text: Praise is the highest form of prayer. When you praise God in the midst of your circumstances, you invite His presence and power into your situation...
devotional.verse: Let everything that has breath praise the Lord.
